text:
おっかえりー！
カタナの使い方、少しうまくなったね。

それもこれも、わたしの考えた
訓練用メニューのおかげだよねー？

もちろん、あなたのがんばりもあるけど
カタナの腕を上げたいなら
これからもわたしのとこへおいでー。

もっとすごい訓練用メニュー
考えとくから、また

Welcome back! Looks like you're getting a bit
more used to wielding Katanas, huh?

I bet it's all thanks to the super-great
training regimen I threw together for you, yeah?

Not to downplay all the hard work you've
put in, of course! Now then, if you want to
get even better, just be sure to drop by
and see me.

I'll have an even better plan put together by
then, I promise.
